name: Road Runner Svc

WebSearch returned no direct hits for 'Road Runner Svc Montgomery MI Chuck Scherdt school bus'

districts_or_customers: Unconfirmed; possibly Vineland/Cumberland County area schools given actual HQ

sources: Source data lists Ocean City, NJ address (3033 Simpson Ave) but multiple third-party records (Yelp, YellowPages, D&B, Kompass, loadconnect) place Bernhardt's Limousines Unlimited Inc at 2 N State St, Vineland, NJ 08360, ph (856) 691-0788 / (856) 305-3840 — likely a data error in the source file
fit_notes: Likely a small family livery operator (>40 years in business) rather than a true school-bus contractor. Inactive USDOT and ~$161K estimated revenue make it a marginal Summit tuck-in candidate. If it holds NJ Type S sped-needs routes in Cumberland County, could be a low-cost route acquisition; otherwise pass.
